thread_title: V2.2.3預告：特別幻衣活動┊V2.2.3 Preview: Awakener Skins Event
V2.2.3預告：特別幻衣活動┊V2.2.3 Preview: Awakener Skins Event

content:
⭐**活動時間：** 6 月 30 日 9:00 - 7 月 28 日 9:00

⭐**活動介紹：**
✦ 守密人可在自選活動喚醒「久遠的呼喚」中，任選下面一組SSR喚醒體及推薦命輪加入自選卡池：
「混沌」：哈姆林×永恆安魂曲、塔薇×隱世的轉輪、莉莉×跨越疼痛、萊克×好運時間、「24」×畸體回噬
「血肉」：薩爾瓦多×神言石板、泰旖絲×慈悲的哺育、血鏈·希洛、沉入殷紅、索蕾爾×以薔薇之名
「深海」：圖魯×神王的頌歌、彌利亞姆×虔誠的偉力、墨菲×隱秘的誕生
「超維」：旺達×女王的戒律、奧爾拉×詩箋的句尾、達芙黛爾×至為珍貴的藏品

✦ 選定的SSR喚醒體與推薦命輪的獲取機率將提升。且若獲得喚醒體，則必定是所選喚醒體界域的喚醒體。

✦ 在本次活動喚醒中，若連續2次喚醒獲取的UP物品相同，則下次通過喚醒獲取的UP必定為另一UP物品。

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

⭐**Event Period: **9:00 AM, June 30 – 9:00 AM, July 28
⭐**Event Introduction:**
✦ Select one of the following SSR Awakeners and their recommended Wheel of Destiny to be the Rate-Up items in the "Self-Select Event Awakening: The Timeless Call":
"Chaos": Hameln×Eternal Requiem, Tawil×Wheel Unseen, Lily×Grace Through Pain, Ryker×Hour of Fortune, "24"×Aberrant Devour
"Caro": Salvador×Tablet of Scriptures, Thais×Merciful Nurturing, Helot: Catena×Drowning in Crimson, Sorel×By Rose Alone
"Aequor": Tulu×Hymn of the Sovereign, Miryam×Power of the Pious, Murphy×Shrouded Birth
"Ultra": Wanda×Queen's Edict, Horla×The Last Verse, Daffodil×Treasured Rarity

✦ The chance to obtain the selected SSR Awakener and their recommended Wheel of Destiny will be increased. Additionally, if an Awakener is obtained, it will definitely belong to the Realm of the selected Awakener.

✦ In this Awakening Event, if the same Rate-Up item is obtained twice in a row, the next Rate-Up item obtained through Awakening is guaranteed to be the other Rate-Up item.

content:
第19期特別學園活動
⭐**活動時間：**6 月 30 日 9:00 - 7 月 14 日 9:00

⭐**活動介紹：**
✦** 第十九期「學園禮贈」**
累計登入 7 天，可領取「流明之芯」×10 ！
累計登入 14 天，可獲得其他「學園禮贈」升級獎勵！
✦ **第十九期「課題紀錄」**
本期核心課題·限定頭像與本期核心課題·限定對戰表情，守密人可點擊下方圖片查看；
本期特別課題紀錄期間完成每日任務、每週任務和學期任務可以獲得雙倍的課題經驗。
✦ **第十九賽季「偉大的征服」 **
本賽季·限定對戰表情，守密人可點擊下方圖片查看。

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Mythag Event Special Edition #19
⭐**Event Period: **9:00 AM, June 30 - 9:00 AM, July 14

⭐**Event Introduction:**
✦ **"Gifts from Mythag" Season 19**
Log in for a total of 7 days to claim "Luminous Core"×10!
Log in for a total of 14 days to receive additional "Gifts from Mythag" upgrade rewards!
✦ **Curriculum #19**
Check out this Semester's Premium Topics exclusive Avatars & Traphase Emotes below!
During this Semester, Daily Tasks, Weekly Tasks, and Semester Tasks grant 2x Topic EXP!
✦ **Season 19: The Great Conquering**
Check out this Season's limited Traphase Emotes below!
